default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Biweekly sync between Datagrid and partners to discuss content creation, AI's impact on business, and Thiago's recent experiences.](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [In-person meetings remain crucial for closing deals and maintaining customer relationships, despite AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [AI is transforming hiring practices; Datagrid now uses AI for initial candidate interviews and values AI proficiency in candidates](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Thiago believes human creativity and authenticity will remain valuable, even as AI augments various aspects of work and life](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

## Topics

### AI's Impact on Business and Hiring

  - [AI elevates importance of human interaction in sales/software development](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Datagrid now uses AI for initial candidate interviews, encouraging AI use during process](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Hiring focus shifts to candidates' AI proficiency and ability to leverage tools effectively](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Content marketing roles challenged by AI capabilities; differentiation from ChatGPT crucial](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Thiago predicts emergence of new roles like "AI Agent Architects" to enable AI in enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)

### In-Person Meetings vs. Remote Interactions

  - [Thiago travels frequently for in-person customer meetings (Brazil, California, Europe)](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Face-to-face interactions crucial for:](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
      - [Closing deals (easier to read room, capture attention)](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Maintaining relationships](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [Identifying potential issues early (e.g., wrong implementation plans)](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Human curiosity and genuine interest in customer problems remain vital](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### Content Creation and Social Media Strategy

  - [Thiago consistently wears Datagrid merch in videos/calls for brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Team working on creating content from recent webinar with Damon](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Kevin building posts from quote cards, past interviews, and Thiago's experiences](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)

### Real Estate Market Challenges

  - [Discussion on difficulties of apartment hunting in NYC and SF](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [High competition, need for immediate availability, and fast-moving market in both cities](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Differences in lease structures between NYC (yearly renewals) and California (month-to-month after first year)](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Thiago to send intro to Damon for potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [Kevin to continue creating and submitting content for approval](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Team to follow up on webinar transcript and additional quote cards](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Mara to keep team updated on apartment search progress](https://fathom.video/share/hk4xwqM6CtxnAYdti_GCszsVpY_X7Pix?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
